attacking_style: Launches powerful solo attacks 1-3km from summit finishes in massive gears, excelling on steep gradients above 8%. Attacks explosively rather than through sustained tempo, often targeting moments when rivals' teams are exhausted.
team_tactics: Severely hampered by weak Astana team support (2017), frequently isolated entering key finales. When present, teammates attack early to break rival support structures before Aru's late acceleration. UAE Emirates showed inadequate preparation (2019 collapse).
terrain_preference: Steep, short finishing climbs (La Planche des Belles Filles profile) where explosive power in big gears compensates for lack of sustained climbing diesel. Exposed on long, steady tempo climbs and technical descents where he has crashed.
vulnerability: Catastrophic positioning without team support cost 24+ seconds on flat stages. Third-week time trials reveal unexpected weakness despite TT champion status. Repeatedly distanced by multiple accelerations on long climbs. Descending crashes documented.
key_patterns: Attacks 1-3km from summit in massive gears on steep gradients, holding solo efforts 25km+ (2+ instances)
Isolated in crucial moments due to weak/collapsed team support, losing significant time on non-selective stages (3+ instances)
Sharp decline from 2017 peak: four consecutive years of worsening results before retirement at 31
Lacks sprint finish after solo efforts caught, repeatedly passed in final meters (3+ instances)
Third-week form collapse pattern: slower TT than diesel riders, cracking early in groups (2018-2019)
Reads tactical moments well but often lacks legs to execute: initiates moves countered by rivals (4+ instances)
form_trajectory: negative: Catastrophic decline from 2017 yellow jersey to 2019 DNFs with 17+ minute losses and weakness, retired 2021 after four consecutive declining years
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 21
